channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tim Heidecker Proposes Transforming Infowars into a Satirical Streaming Platform
item.description: The article discusses Tim Heidecker's vision for reimagining Infowars, a controversial media outlet known for its conspiracy theories, into a satirical streaming platform akin to Adult Swim. Heidecker...

item.title: Karnataka Opposition Alarms Over SIR Process Irregularities and Neutrality Concerns
item.description: Opposition leaders in Karnataka have raised serious concerns about the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of voter rolls, alleging massive irregularities in the process. The Election Commission's door-t...

item.title: Chicago Man’s Dismembered Remains Found in Freezer After Alleged Family Crime
item.description: The remains of a 38-year-old Chicago man, Dalewayne Turner, were discovered dismembered in a basement freezer and scattered in a lake over 160 miles away. His wife, Robin Turner, and half-brother, Jam...

item.title: Ntumba's Family Seeks Justice Amid Street Renaming Delays
item.description: The family of Mthokozisi Ntumba, a student killed during a protest in Braamfontein five years ago, has welcomed Johannesburg's decision to rename De Beer Street in his honor. While acknowledging the g...

item.title: Netanyahu defends Israel's actions amid Gaza humanitarian crisis
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu became combative during a CNN interview with host Dana Bash, who pressed him on Israel's role in the ongoing humanitarian crisis in Gaza. Bash highlighted the...

item.title: IOC to review observer's report after disputed TOC elections as newly elected officials assume office
item.description: The International Olympic Committee (IOC) is waiting for a report from its election observer, Donald Rukare, before deciding its official position on the disputed Tanzania Olympic Committee (TOC) elec...

item.title: Legal Battle Over Sara Duterte's Testimony in Impeachment Trial
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte has entered a critical phase as the prosecution seeks to use her as a witness against herself. House private prosecutor Lorna Kapunan revealed that...

item.title: Botswana's Economic Shift: Cattle as a New Pillar Beyond Diamonds
item.description: Botswana, once reliant on diamond exports, is now pivoting its economy towards cattle farming. The country's beef industry is emerging as a critical driver for economic diversification, reducing depen...

item.title: Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial Progresses with Tax Records and Witness Testimonies
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte continues with key developments. Vice President Duterte appeared at the Senate but skipped the second day of her trial, raising questions about her...

item.title: Understanding Age-Related Eye Conditions and Prevention
item.description: The article discusses how aging impacts eye health, leading to conditions like diabetic retinopathy, glaucoma, cataracts, and macular degeneration. It highlights the importance of regular optometrist ...

item.title: South African Tourists Expelled from Mozambique Restaurants Amid Cross-Border Tensions
item.description: Videos circulating on social media show South African tourists being chased out of restaurants and recreational spots in parts of Mozambique. Locals are seen chanting 'Tlhelelani Mzansi' (Go back to S...

item.title: Great British Energy – Nuclear (GBE-N) Declines to Provide Budget Breakdown for SMR Contract
item.description: Great British Energy – Nuclear (GBE-N) has stated it does not hold a detailed breakdown of the £20bn initial budget estimate for the Small Modular Reactor (SMR) Technology Partner (TP) Contract. The T...

item.title: Australia strengthens Pacific security partnerships with Fiji as regional competition with China intensifies
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has strengthened Australia's strategic presence in the Pacific by signing major new agreements with Fiji during a regional diplomatic tour. The centrepiece of the visit...

item.title: Carney's Pipeline Approval Reflects Shift in Canadian Energy Policy
item.description: The article analyzes Prime Minister Mark Carney's approval of new oil pipeline projects in Canada, linking it to public support revealed through government polls. Despite environmental concerns about ...

item.title: Calgary Lifts Advisory on Bow and Elbow Rivers as Flow Rates Drop
item.description: The Calgary Regional Emergency Measures Organization (REMO) has lifted the advisory for the Bow and Elbow rivers following a significant decrease in flow rates. This decision comes after continuous mo...

item.title: Ghana-South Africa summit postponed due to migrant tensions
item.description: The planned state visit between Ghana's President John Mahama and South Africa's Cyril Ramaphosa has been postponed amid escalating anti-immigrant violence in South Africa. Accra cited concerns that o...

item.title: Federal Cabinet Approves Comprehensive Haj Policy for 2027–2030
item.description: The federal cabinet has approved a four-year Haj Policy (2027–2030) to enhance pilgrim services and operational efficiency. The policy includes digitalization of the Haj management system, a Shariah-c...

item.title: Patrice Lawrence: Championing Inclusive Reading for Diverse Children
item.description: Patrice Lawrence, the newly appointed UK children’s laureate, reflects on her journey from a Trinidadian-born child in foster care to an acclaimed author advocating for inclusive literature. Born in 1...

item.title: Young Kenol Manager Dies Suddenly Before Wedding
item.description: Kevin Masaba, 28, an Assistant HR Manager at Kenol, died suddenly on July 3, 2026, just two months before his wedding. Friends and family are in shock as they await postmortem results to determine the...

item.title: NECTA Cancels 58 Students' Exam Results Over ChatGPT Use
item.description: The National Examinations Council of Tanzania (NECTA) has canceled the results of 58 students who used ChatGPT during exams, emphasizing that technological tools cannot be used to gain unfair advantag...
